import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import'./Toggle.css';import{setTheme}from'../../Util/themes';import{SunIcon}from'@primer/octicons-react';function Toggle(){// eslint-disable-next-line
const[togClass,setTogClass]=useState('dark');let theme=localStorage.getItem('theme');const handleOnClick=()=>{if(localStorage.getItem('theme')==='theme-dark'){setTheme('theme-light');setTogClass('light');}else{setTheme('theme-dark');setTogClass('dark');}};useEffect(()=>{if(localStorage.getItem('theme')==='theme-dark'){setTogClass('dark');}else if(localStorage.getItem('theme')==='theme-light'){setTogClass('light');}},[theme]);return/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div",{className:"toggle-container"},/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div",{id:"moon"},/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("i",{class:"far fa-moon"})),/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("label",{className:"switch"},/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("input",{type:"checkbox",hidden:true,id:"toggle",className:"toggle--checkbox",onClick:handleOnClick}),/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("span",{className:"slider"})),/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement("div",{id:"sun"},/*#__PURE__*/React.createElement(SunIcon,{size:19})));}export default Toggle;
